data.requirement: Link detailed_player_data with match_summary via match_id to enrich player performance records with match outcome context (win/loss) and season data.
data.reason: Original requirement lacked explicit join implementation between key tables. Match outcome in detailed_player_data needs validation against match_summary for accurate analysis.

data.requirement: Calculate separate batting (runs × strike_rate) and bowling (wickets × (1 - (economy/10))) impact scores normalized by matches_played, rather than a combined metric.
data.reason: Combining batting/bowling metrics additively misrepresents specialists. Separate scores maintain position-specific analysis while preventing skewed comparisons.

visualization.requirement: Replace scatter plot matrix with faceted scatter plots: (1) Batting Impact vs Win Ratio (2) Bowling Impact vs Win Ratio, both with team-level aggregation.
visualization.reason: Scatter plot matrices become unreadable with 1,872 unique players. Faceted plots reduce visual clutter while maintaining correlation analysis capability.

visualization.requirement: Replace heatmap with parallel coordinates plot showing batting impact, bowling impact, win ratio, and matches played for top 50 players by total impact.
visualization.reason: Fixed thresholds in heatmap (SR>80, economy<5) may exclude contextually good performers. Parallel coordinates allow multi-criteria analysis without arbitrary cutoffs.

visualization.requirement: Remove box plots of fantasy_points. Use stacked bar charts showing % contribution of batting/bowling metrics to team's total wins per player.
visualization.reason: Box plots with disabled interactions violate system constraints. Contribution percentage better aligns with core objective of quantifying victory impact.

interaction.requirement: Modify click-based highlighting to use lasso selection in scatter plots rather than matrix selection.
interaction.reason: Scatter plot matrix removal necessitates alternative selection method. Lasso supports group analysis of players in similar performance ranges.

interaction.requirement: Add match_type filter (ODI/WC/T20) alongside season range slider, joined via match_summary data.
interaction.reason: Performance norms vary significantly by match format. Dual filtering prevents skewed temporal analysis across formats.
